title: Learn how Professor David J. Malan realized computer science is the field for him.
summary: Professor David J. Malan shares how he discovered computer science as his field. CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming, available through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
writeup: Professor David J. Malan recounts how he came to recognize computer science as his field. The clip ties to CS50, Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming, which is offered through edX, the Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare. The takeaway is a personal account of finding direction in the discipline, along with the multiple platforms through which CS50 can be accessed.
